info.title: owlnighter API
info.description: Authoritative API for the owlnighter reading-habit platform. Generated from Zod contracts.

post.summary: Deterministic Google Books + Open Library search and candidate merge.
Gemini Search Grounding enrichment / edition reconciliation.

get.summary: List the authenticated user's library books.

post.summary: Add a grounded book to the user's library.

get.summary: Streaks, XP, and the trailing 7-day reading window for the caller.
List the caller's plans (newest planVersion first). Filter with `?bookId=`.

post.summary: Create or refresh a nightly reading path.

get.summary: Fetch a plan and its step states.

post.summary: Open (or reuse) a reading session for a step.
Generate or fetch tonight's quiz for a step.
Instant per-question feedback (does not record an attempt or affect streak).
Score answers, mark the reading complete, update streak.
Register or update a device push token.
Admin-scoped catalog search (same deterministic search as searchBooks, gated by admin_panel session instead of a user JWT).

get.summary: Inspect grounding sources, facts, and diffs for a book.

post.summary: Manual correction / trust lock on a book's grounded fields.

get.summary: Dashboard tiles: grounding buckets, quiz pass rate, TTS assets, book count.
List cached TTS assets for the cache inspector.

post.summary: Mark a quiz invalid so it is not reused; records a reason.

get.summary: List reading plans (newest first) with derived step counts. `?limit=`.
List quiz instances with derived question counts. `?stepId=&limit=`.

post.summary: Send a test push of a given type to a user's registered device tokens.
Request an admin-panel account (@mytsi.org only; requires approval).
Log in to the admin panel; returns an opaque session token.

put.summary: Update one setting by key, validated against its per-key schema.

get.summary: Live model catalog for a given provider. `?provider=groq|openrouter`.
